PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?religionLabel(xsd:double(?percentage) AS ?percent) WHERE {
  wd:Q142 p:P5100 ?religionStatement .
  ?religionStatement ps:P5100 ?demographic .
  ?demographic wdt:P1114 ?percentage .
  ?demographic wdt:P518 ?religion .
  ?religion rdfs:label ?religionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?religionLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?percent)
LIMIT 2
